allow: Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('carrier:', d['carrier']\); print\('score:', d['score']\); print\('anomalies:', d['anomalies_count']\); print\('lines:', len\(d['lines']\)\)")

Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:8000/report -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"score":34,"carrier":"CMA CGM","route":"Shanghai → Le Havre","period":"Q1 2026","anomalies_count":2,"recoverable":"185 USD","lines":[{"code":"Ocean Freight","desc":"Fret de base","amount":"1850 USD","status":"ok","verdict":"Conforme"}],"summary":"Test OK","summary_type":"err"}' -o /tmp/test_rapport.pdf)
